overview.ko: DHT Holdings Inc는 Energy 분야 Oil & Gas Midstream 기업입니다.
overview.en: DHT Holdings, Inc., through its subsidiaries, owns and operates crude oil tankers primarily in Monaco, Singapore, Norway, and India. The company also offers technical management services. As of December 15, 2025, it had a fleet of 22 very large crude carriers.

summary.ko: DHT Holdings Inc(DHT)는 복합 점수 90.5로 임계 70.0를 상회했습니다. 성장·밸류·모멘텀 균형이 양호합니다.
summary.en: DHT Holdings, Inc. (DHT) cleared the 70.0 threshold with composite score 90.5; growth, valuation, and momentum align.

growth.ko: 매출 성장 78.1% / 이익 성장 100.0% 수준으로 성장 점수 100.0입니다.
growth.en: Revenue growth 78.1% and earnings growth 100.0% yield growth score 100.0.

valuation.en: At P/E 8.39 and PEG 1.19, valuation score is 80.5.

quality.en: ROE 28.89%, operating margin basis — quality score 83.8.

risks.ko: 실적 가이던스 하향 시 성장 프리미엄 축소 가능
risks.en: Growth premium may compress on guidance cuts

risks.ko: 글로벌 금리·유동성 변화에 따른 밸류에이션 리레이팅
